Simple 3-Step Process
📋
Take the Survey
Answer a few quick questions about your Home Depot shopping experience.
🎯
Complete 4–6 Simple Deals
Includes free trials, app downloads, and Home Depot shopping surveys. You choose which ones work for you.
🎁
Get Rewarded
Receive your $750 Home Depot gift card within 24–48 hours after completing the survey.
